---
name: New service request
about: Request support for an additional AWS service
---

**Service name**
e.g. AWS WAF, Amazon Cognito

**AWS CLI commands used to list resources**
e.g. `aws wafv2 list-web-acls --scope REGIONAL`

**Terraform resource types needed**
e.g. `aws_wafv2_web_acl`, `aws_wafv2_ip_set`

**Terraform import ID format**
Link to the Import section of the Terraform registry page for each resource.

**Are you willing to submit a PR?**
Yes / No
